---
title: "SCIM 2.0 Common Attributes (RFC 7643 §3.1)"
subtitle: "Schema Reference · common.schema.json"
date: 2026-05-14
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Developer Reference

This is a UIAO JSON Schema, rendered as a developer-reference page per
[ADR-072](../../adr/adr-072-canon-publication-policy.qmd).

- **Source:** [`src/uiao/schemas/scim/common.schema.json`](../../../src/uiao/schemas/scim/common.schema.json)
- **Dialect:** `https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema`
- **`$id`:** `https://uiao.io/schemas/scim/common.schema.json`
:::

## Description

Shared definitions used by every SCIM resource. Sourced verbatim from RFC 7643 §3.1 (Common Attributes) and §2.3 (Attribute Data Types). Pinned to UIAO_143. The schemas in this directory reference these $defs via $ref so the per-resource schemas stay focused on their resource-specific shape.

## Top-Level Properties

_(no top-level properties defined)_

## Full Schema

```{.json filename="common.schema.json"}
{
  "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
  "$id": "https://uiao.io/schemas/scim/common.schema.json",
  "title": "SCIM 2.0 Common Attributes (RFC 7643 \u00a73.1)",
  "description": "Shared definitions used by every SCIM resource. Sourced verbatim from RFC 7643 \u00a73.1 (Common Attributes) and \u00a72.3 (Attribute Data Types). Pinned to UIAO_143. The schemas in this directory reference these $defs via $ref so the per-resource schemas stay focused on their resource-specific shape.",
  "type": "object",
  "$defs": {
    "scimId": {
      "type": "string",
      "minLength": 1,
      "description": "RFC 7643 \u00a73.1 'id'. Service-provider-assigned unique identifier; server-generated; readOnly; required on returned resources."
    },
    "externalId": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "RFC 7643 \u00a73.1 'externalId'. Client-assigned identifier intended to remain stable across the resource's lifecycle in the client's domain."
    },
    "schemasArray": {
      "type": "array",
      "minItems": 1,
      "uniqueItems": true,
      "items": {
        "type": "string",
        "format": "uri"
      },
      "description": "RFC 7643 \u00a73 'schemas'. URIs identifying the schemas this resource conforms to. Required; the first entry is the core schema; subsequent entries are extension schemas."
    },
    "scimDateTime": {
      "type": "string",
      "format": "date-time",
      "description": "RFC 7643 \u00a72.3.5 DateTime. ISO 8601 / XML Schema 1.1 dateTime, e.g. 2008-01-23T04:56:22Z."
    },
    "meta": {
      "type": "object",
      "description": "RFC 7643 \u00a73.1 'meta'. Service-provider-maintained metadata about the resource. All sub-attributes are readOnly.",
      "properties": {
        "resourceType": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Name of the resource type (e.g. 'User', 'Group')."
        },
        "created": {
          "$ref": "#/$defs/scimDateTime"
        },
        "lastModified": {
          "$ref": "#/$defs/scimDateTime"
        },
        "location": {
          "type": "string",
          "format": "uri",
          "description": "URI of the resource being returned."
        },
        "version": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Opaque version (entity-tag, RFC 7232 \u00a72.3) of the resource."
        }
      },
      "additionalProperties": true
    },
    "multiValuedAttribute": {
      "type": "object",
      "description": "RFC 7643 \u00a72.4 multi-valued attribute element. Sub-attributes are normative but not all are required; consumers MAY tighten this with a closed schema.",
      "properties": {
        "value": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Significant value of the attribute (e.g. the email address itself)."
        },
        "display": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Human-readable label, primarily for display. ReadOnly."
        },
        "type": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Label classifying the value (e.g. 'work', 'home'). Per-attribute canonical values are defined in RFC 7643 \u00a74."
        },
        "primary": {
          "type": "boolean",
          "description": "Whether this is the primary value for this attribute. At most one primary value per multi-valued attribute."
        },
        "$ref": {
          "type": "string",
          "format": "uri",
          "description": "Reference URI to a SCIM resource (used by 'groups', 'members', 'manager')."
        }
      },
      "additionalProperties": true
    },
    "binary": {
      "type": "string",
      "contentEncoding": "base64",
      "description": "RFC 7643 \u00a72.3.6 Binary. Base64-encoded per RFC 4648 \u00a74."
    }
  }
}
```
